response.global_analysis: The audio features the song 'Kyou mo Dai-tensai!' by Ichijou Ririka. The provided Reference JSON contains a different verse than what is sung in this specific clip, so I have ignored the Reference JSON and relied exclusively on the audio and the burnt-in on-screen text for transcription. Timing is strictly synchronized to the vocal waveform, with gaps maintained during instrumental sections.

subtitles.original: お仕事は年中無休です
subtitles.english: Work is 24/7, 365 days a year.
I'm already a great genius!

subtitles.original: あ〜限界！これ以上キュンキュンされたら
subtitles.english: Ah, my limit! If you make my heart throb any more...
I'll be in trouble.
Because I want to go to heaven from joy.
Absolute exoneration!
You are number one!

subtitles.original: 予約した推しのフィギュア
subtitles.english: The figure of my favorite I pre-ordered...
is scheduled to ship next year (Seriously!?)

subtitles.original: え〜そんなの慣れっこです
subtitles.english: Eh, I'm used to that.
It'll arrive when I've forgotten about it...!

subtitles.original: 溢れる才能 無量大数
subtitles.english: Overflowing talent, infinity...
But...

subtitles.original: セル画のままに増えすぎる らびゅー！
subtitles.english: Increasing just like cels, love you!
Ah, I love you so much!

subtitles.original: 今日も大天才っ！ だーいてんさいっ！
subtitles.english: A great genius today too! G-g-genius!

subtitles.original: 死ぬ無理待っててぇ 考えられないや…
subtitles.english: Dying, no way, wait! I can't think...
Precious.

subtitles.original: 次の現場まで待てないや
subtitles.english: I can't wait until the next live.

subtitles.original: もう大天才っ！ あ〜限界！
subtitles.english: Already a great genius! Ah, my limit!

subtitles.original: 切り詰めた生活 何一つ苦じゃない
subtitles.english: Life on a tight budget isn't hard at all.
Because even like this...
it's a day overflowing with happiness.
Today too.
